Compliance Notes: Annual Colorado hazmat carrier registration. Required for transport of Class 3 flammable liquids.
Renewal Checklist: Submit CO-CDPHE form + FMCSA MCS-90 copy + insurance certificate

Compliance Notes: Federal hazmat registration required for transporters of highway route controlled quantities. 4-year cycle.
Renewal Checklist: PHMSA online portal renewal + updated insurance binder

Compliance Notes: Annual UCR filing for interstate motor carrier. Fee based on fleet size.
Renewal Checklist: Complete UCR registration via UCR system + pay fee

Compliance Notes: Apportioned registration for vehicles operating in multiple states. Annual renewal through CO DMV.
Renewal Checklist: Submit IRP renewal application + mileage records + fees per state

Compliance Notes: Q1 2026 IFTA fuel tax return. Quarterly filing required for fleet operating across state lines.
Renewal Checklist: Compile fuel purchase records + miles by state + file CO DR 0101

Compliance Notes: Biennial update to FMCSA operating authority. No later than October each cycle.
Renewal Checklist: Submit MCS-150 via FMCSA Portal + verify MC number is active
